name: Red Velvet Delight
description: A classic red velvet cake with a rich cream cheese frosting, perfect for any celebration.

name: Chocolate Lava Cake
description: A decadent, warm chocolate cake with a gooey, molten center. Served best with a scoop of vanilla ice cream.

name: Classic Croissant
description: A buttery, flaky, and viennoiserie pastry, golden-brown and perfect for breakfast.

name: Blueberry Muffin
description: A soft and moist muffin bursting with fresh blueberries and a hint of lemon zest.

name: Apple Pie
description: A traditional apple pie with a flaky crust and a sweet, spiced apple filling.

name: Choco Chip Cookies
description: Classic homemade chocolate chip cookies, crispy on the edges and chewy in the middle.
